title: Squirrel Removal in Ocean Hill, Brooklyn | $900–$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Ocean Hill, Brooklyn. Humane extraction, exclusion & damage repair. Licensed experts serving Ocean Hill. Call for fast service!
intro: Ocean Hill residents dealing with squirrels in attics, walls, or vents need swift, humane removal to protect their homes. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel extraction and exclusion services throughout Ocean Hill, from the historic blocks near Saratoga Avenue to the residential streets surrounding Mother Gaston Boulevard. Our licensed technicians understand the unique challenges Brooklyn homeowners face with persistent squirrel infestations.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Ocean Hill for years with humane, effective squirrel removal that addresses both immediate intrusions and long-term prevention. Our technicians are familiar with Ocean Hill's mix of brownstones, multi-family homes, and apartment buildings, ensuring customized solutions that protect your property and prevent re-entry.
localContext: Ocean Hill's tree-lined streets and proximity to parks like Betsy Head Park create ideal habitats for urban squirrels seeking shelter in residential structures. The neighborhood's classic Brooklyn architecture, with its rooflines, vents, and older construction, often provides multiple entry points that require professional inspection and sealing.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Ocean Hill?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Ocean Hill typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage repair needed. This includes humane trapping, exclusion work, and cleanup services.

faqs.question: How do squirrels get into Ocean Hill homes?
faqs.answer: Squirrels commonly enter through roof vents, soffit gaps, chimney openings, and damaged fascia boards. Ocean Hill's older buildings often have small construction gaps that squirrels can chew through or squeeze into, especially during fall and spring nesting seasons.

faqs.question: Are squirrel removal services in Ocean Hill humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, Best Pest Control NYC uses humane, legal methods for squirrel removal in Ocean Hill. We prioritize live trapping and relocation when possible, following all New York State wildlife regulations, and focus on exclusion to prevent future entry without harming animals.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Ocean Hill property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service in Ocean Hill for emergency squirrel situations. Initial trapping typically takes 3-7 days depending on the number of squirrels, followed by exclusion work and repairs to ensure your home remains squirrel-free.
